RG-58.notes: Thin, flexible, higher loss -- fine for short runs or low power

RG-213.notes: Thicker than RG-58, lower loss, common general-purpose ham coax

RG-8.notes: Similar to RG-213, solid polyethylene dielectric

RG-8X.notes: Foam dielectric, lower loss than RG-58 in a similar thin form factor

RG-214.notes: Double-shielded RG-213 equivalent, better shielding for high-RF environments

9913.notes: Air-spaced dielectric, low loss, popular for longer coax runs

LMR-400.notes: Low-loss foam dielectric coax, common for longer runs to a mast-mounted antenna

Ladder line 450.notes: Window/ladder line, very low loss, needs a balanced feed (tuner with balun)

Ladder line 600.notes: Wide-spaced open-wire line, lowest loss option, bulky to route
